references.name: D2MOO
policy: Use source code to recover gameplay intent, names and control-flow concepts.
Never reuse 32-bit addresses, ordinals, structure layouts or ABI assumptions in D2R.
Prove every D2R 3.2.92777 correspondence independently in the persistent workbench.

references.name: D2SSharp
references.upstreamTarget: Diablo II and D2R save formats 96-105
policy: Use the pinned implementation to verify D2S and D2I section layouts, version boundaries and bit encodings.
Keep BKVince TXT files as the sole gameplay-data and item-stat encoding source.
Preserve MIT attribution for any source code adapted rather than independently reimplemented.
